title: Built a stock screening tool, opening it up for feedback
author: 123Xrp
selftext:
Hey everyone,

I’ve been working on an app that helps me make better decisions about my investments. It brings all the data I care about into one place, lets me track my portfolio in real time, and evaluate stocks based on real metrics, analyst reactions, and market sentiment.

After some friends tried it out and gave feedback and suggestions, I decided to open it up to everyone to get more feedback and recommendations 🙂

It’s not meant to give buy recommendations. It just surfaces and centralizes data in one place in a simple, easy way.

Here’s the link if you want to try it out:  
https://qedge.app/
